content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Evidence ledger is empty, but the draft makes multiple substantive statements about what is 'typical', 'more standard', or 'unusual' in NDAs without any supporting ledger items.", "fix": "Either add ledger items supporting market-standard characterizations or remove/soften those statements so they are clearly opinion-based, not evidence-based."}, {"problem": "The SKILL validation checklist items (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage, flow-down, NNN matrix, ratification clause, ADS/Pakistan table) are not all satisfied or explicitly marked as [BLANK]/[TBD].", "fix": "Explicitly mark each non-applicable checklist item as [TBD] or explain its inapplicability, rather than leaving them unaddressed."}, {"problem": "The checklist requires an attorney-review disclaimer at the top of the output, but the disclaimer appears after introductory text rather than clearly at the top.", "fix": "Move or repeat the attorney-review disclaimer so it is the first line or clearly at the very top of the report."}]}
